metadata.note: Output used as-is without manual revision or selection.

causal_texts: A sudden storm damaged the old bridge across the river. Engineers closed the old bridge to all traffic. Workers repaired the old bridge with new steel beams. Cars and trucks crossed the old bridge without any trouble.

A fierce windstorm blew the roof off the red barn. The farmer bought new wooden shingles for the red barn. Carpenters installed the fresh roof onto the red barn. The new roof protected the red barn from heavy rainstorms.

A hidden rock punctured the hull of the wooden boat. Cold water flooded the bottom section of the wooden boat. The sailor pumped the salty water out of the wooden boat. The sailor patched the broken hole in the wooden boat.

A distracted driver dented the front bumper of the silver car. A skilled mechanic ordered a replacement bumper for the silver car. The mechanic attached the brand new bumper onto the silver car. The happy owner drove the silver car out of the shop.

City officials approved a brand new location for the bronze statue. Workers lifted the bronze statue onto a large flatbed truck. The heavy truck transported the bronze statue across the busy city. Workers secured the bronze statue onto a new marble pedestal.

A severe winter storm destroyed the roof of the brick house. A local builder inspected the extensive damage to the brick house. The builder replaced the broken shingles on the brick house. The family felt completely safe inside the brick house again.

A bright lightning strike split a branch of the tall tree. The heavy branch fell from the tall tree onto the grass. A local landscaper cut the fallen branch away from the tall tree. The landscaper cleared the dangerous debris from the tall tree.

The brave knight dulled the sharp blade of the steel sword. A village blacksmith heated the edge of the steel sword. The blacksmith hammered the heavy metal of the steel sword. The knight polished the steel sword for the next battle.

A clumsy servant dropped the golden cup onto the stone floor. The hard impact dented the smooth side of the golden cup. A skilled jeweler hammered the dent out of the golden cup. The king drank sweet wine from the golden cup again.

A sharp tree branch tore a hole in the leather jacket. The tired hiker brought the leather jacket to a skilled tailor. The tailor sewed a dark patch onto the leather jacket. The hiker wore the leather jacket on the very next adventure.

A careless student spilled hot coffee on the heavy dictionary. The hot liquid stained several pages of the heavy dictionary. The librarian carefully dried the wet pages of the heavy dictionary. A student borrowed the heavy dictionary for a history project.

A curious child broke the glass face of the antique clock. A repairman ordered a replacement glass for the antique clock. The repairman installed the new face on the antique clock. The family checked the time on the antique clock every morning.

A harsh frost cracked the stone base of the marble fountain. Plumbers drained all the water from the marble fountain. Masons patched the deep cracks in the marble fountain. Fresh water flowed through the marble fountain during the spring.

A broken rail derailed the front wheels of the steam locomotive. Engineers lifted the front wheels of the steam locomotive. Mechanics repaired the broken suspension on the steam locomotive. The conductor drove the steam locomotive out of the railyard.

A running dog knocked over the glass vase on the table. The sudden fall chipped the rim of the glass vase. An artist sanded the sharp edge of the glass vase. A woman arranged fresh flowers inside the glass vase.

A delivery truck crashed into the side of the iron gate. The strong impact bent the thick bars of the iron gate. Metalworkers straightened the bent bars on the iron gate. A guard locked the iron gate at the end of the day.

A careless musician snapped a thick string on the acoustic guitar. The musician bought a new string for the acoustic guitar. The musician wound the new string onto the acoustic guitar. The musician played a beautiful song on the acoustic guitar.

An invading army breached the outer wall of the stone castle. The royal guards defended the main courtyard of the stone castle. Builders repaired the massive breach in the stone castle. The king hosted a grand feast inside the stone castle.

A campfire spark burned a small hole in the woolen blanket. The camper sewed thick thread over the hole in the woolen blanket. The camper washed the woolen blanket in a cold stream. The camper slept warmly under the woolen blanket that night.

A careless chef burned sweet soup in the copper pot. The chef scrubbed the burned bottom of the copper pot. The chef boiled clean water in the copper pot. The chef prepared a delicious stew in the copper pot.

A clumsy guest spilled red wine on the silk dress. The bride took the silk dress to a professional cleaner. The cleaner removed the red stain from the silk dress. The bride stored the silk dress in a dark closet.

A careless student bent the mouthpiece of the silver trumpet. The band director bought a new mouthpiece for the silver trumpet. The director attached the clean piece to the silver trumpet. The student played a loud march on the silver trumpet.

A deep scratch ruined the smooth finish of the oak desk. A carpenter sanded the damaged surface of the oak desk. The carpenter applied rich brown stain to the oak desk. A writer typed a long novel on the oak desk.

A sharp cat claw tore the fabric of the velvet armchair. An upholsterer ordered matching red fabric for the velvet armchair. The upholsterer covered the damaged section of the velvet armchair. A sleepy man read a book in the velvet armchair.

A fierce wind ripped a massive hole in the canvas tent. The camper applied a waterproof patch to the canvas tent. The camper pitched the canvas tent in a sheltered valley. The camper stayed completely dry inside the canvas tent.

A careless sailor dropped the heavy lens of the brass telescope. The captain ordered a replacement lens for the brass telescope. The navigator installed the curved glass in the brass telescope. The captain spotted a distant island through the brass telescope.

A deep muddy pothole broke the wheel of the wooden wagon. The driver removed the broken wheel from the wooden wagon. A wheelwright crafted a new wheel for the wooden wagon. The driver pulled the wooden wagon into the bustling market.

Heavy rain rusted the metal chain on the rusty bicycle. The owner scrubbed the orange rust off the rusty bicycle. The owner applied thick oil to the chain of the rusty bicycle. A young boy rode the rusty bicycle around the neighborhood.

A loose setting dropped the central stone of the diamond ring. The worried owner brought the diamond ring to a jeweler. The jeweler secured the loose stone in the diamond ring. The happy owner wore the diamond ring to a fancy party.

A falling book crushed the fragile head of the porcelain doll. A collector bought a replacement head for the porcelain doll. The collector glued the new head onto the porcelain doll. The collector displayed the porcelain doll on a high shelf.

A loud explosion shattered the hanging drops of the crystal chandelier. Servants swept the sharp fragments from beneath the crystal chandelier. A glassmaker hung new drops onto the crystal chandelier. The bright lights illuminated the crystal chandelier during the ball.

A sharp coral reef snagged the ropes of the fishing net. The strong current tore a massive gap in the fishing net. The fisherman wove new green nylon into the fishing net. The fisherman caught many silver fish in the fishing net.

A leaky roof dripped cold water onto the grand piano. A tuner dried the damp strings inside the grand piano. The tuner adjusted the loose pins in the grand piano. A musician performed a classical sonata on the grand piano.

A strong earthquake cracked the mortar of the brick chimney. A mason inspected the dangerous damage to the brick chimney. The mason filled the deep cracks in the brick chimney. Thick smoke rose from the brick chimney during the winter.

A hungry moth chewed a hole in the wool sweater. A grandmother knitted a colorful patch for the wool sweater. The grandmother sewed the tight patch onto the wool sweater. A child wore the wool sweater in the cold snow.

A heavy broadsword dented the flat surface of the metal shield. An armorer hammered the deep dent out of the metal shield. The armorer polished the dull surface of the metal shield. A soldier carried the metal shield into the fierce battle.

A high fire cracked the flat baking stone of the stone oven. The baker removed the broken stone from the stone oven. The baker slid a new baking surface into the stone oven. The baker baked fresh bread in the stone oven.

A deep puddle tarnished the bright face of the silver coin. A collector rubbed a soft cloth over the silver coin. The collector polished the dull edges of the silver coin. The collector placed the silver coin in a display case.

A falling hailstone shattered a top pane of the glass greenhouse. A gardener ordered a replacement pane for the glass greenhouse. The gardener installed the clear pane on the glass greenhouse. Exotic plants flourished inside the glass greenhouse through the winter.

A strong gale lifted a corner of the tin roof. A builder hammered thick iron nails into the tin roof. The builder sealed the overlapping edges of the tin roof. The family stayed completely dry under the tin roof.

A thick chain snapped the top ring off the iron anchor. A shipwright welded a new ring onto the iron anchor. Sailors attached a massive chain to the iron anchor. The crew dropped the iron anchor into the deep bay.

A sharp spur tore the side strap of the leather saddle. A leatherworker cut a fresh strap for the leather saddle. The leatherworker stitched the strong strap onto the leather saddle. A cowboy rode a wild horse with the leather saddle.

A deep scratch obscured the glass face of the brass compass. An explorer ordered a replacement glass for the brass compass. A jeweler fitted the new glass onto the brass compass. The explorer navigated the dark forest with the brass compass.

A thorny bush tore the long sleeve of the cotton shirt. A tailor matched blue thread to the cotton shirt. The tailor stitched the torn fabric of the cotton shirt. A farmer wore the cotton shirt in the hot fields.

A heavy cart cracked a flat paving stone of the stone pathway. A mason removed the broken stone from the stone pathway. The mason laid a fresh slab in the stone pathway. People walked smoothly along the stone pathway in the garden.

A hot fire melted the delicate handle of the silver spoon. A silversmith forged a new handle for the silver spoon. The silversmith polished the dull bowl of the silver spoon. A nobleman ate hot soup with the silver spoon.

A rocky road bent the curved shape of the iron horseshoe. A farrier heated the bent metal of the iron horseshoe. The farrier hammered a better curve into the iron horseshoe. The farrier nailed the iron horseshoe to the wild stallion.

A damp basement rotted the bottom plank of the wooden chest. A carpenter replaced the ruined wood of the wooden chest. The carpenter painted the exterior of the wooden chest. A family stored thick winter blankets in the wooden chest.

A strong wind blew out the flame in the glass lantern. A traveler poured more oil into the glass lantern. The traveler lit the short wick of the glass lantern. The bright flame illuminated the dark path from the glass lantern.

A sharp rock sliced the thick sole of the leather boot. A cobbler glued a fresh sole onto the leather boot. The cobbler polished the dark exterior of the leather boot. A soldier marched many miles in the leather boot.

A falling book dented the metal shade of the brass lamp. An electrician hammered the dent out of the brass lamp. The electrician installed a bright bulb in the brass lamp. A student read a long textbook under the brass lamp.

A sudden fall shattered the reflective glass of the silver mirror. A glazier cut a new piece of glass for the silver mirror. The glazier secured the clear glass in the silver mirror. A beautiful woman checked her hair in the silver mirror.

A harsh winter cracked the carved text of the stone monument. A restorer filled the deep cracks in the stone monument. The restorer cleaned the dirty surface of the stone monument. Visitors read the ancient names on the stone monument.

A heavy blow shattered the decorative panel of the oak door. A carpenter carved a new panel for the oak door. The carpenter fitted the solid wood into the oak door. A guard locked the oak door against the dangerous intruders.

A spilled drink stained the colorful fabric of the cotton quilt. A cleaner applied strong soap to the cotton quilt. The cleaner washed the dirty stain from the cotton quilt. A child slept comfortably under the cotton quilt.

A hidden root snapped the sharp blade of the steel plow. A blacksmith forged a heavy replacement blade for the steel plow. The blacksmith bolted the new blade to the steel plow. A farmer turned the fertile soil with the steel plow.

A fierce gale shattered a long sail of the wooden windmill. A miller crafted a fresh sail for the wooden windmill. The miller attached the heavy canvas to the wooden windmill. The strong breeze turned the sails of the wooden windmill.

A clumsy worker chipped the curved nose of the marble bust. A sculptor glued the broken piece onto the marble bust. The sculptor sanded the rough seam on the marble bust. An art museum displayed the marble bust in the gallery.

noncausal_texts: The old bridge spanned a wide river with three stone arches. The old bridge carried a narrow road between two villages. The old bridge appeared on many postcards of the valley. The old bridge attracted photographers from distant towns.

The red barn stood near the edge of a large cornfield. The red barn featured a faded white door on one side. The red barn provided warm shelter for many farm animals. The red barn held hundreds of bales of sweet hay.

The wooden boat featured bright blue stripes along the painted side. The wooden boat belonged to a famous local deep-sea fisherman. The wooden boat smelled strongly of salt and dried ocean fish. The wooden boat rested on the sandy beach near the pier.

The silver car had comfortable black leather seats inside the cabin. The silver car got excellent gas mileage on long highway trips. The silver car featured a premium sound system with many speakers. The silver car belonged to a successful young local business executive.

The bronze statue depicted a famous military general on a stallion. The bronze statue weighed over two thousand pounds in total weight. The bronze statue stood in the absolute center of the square. The bronze statue attracted many curious tourists during the hot summer.

The brick house featured dark green shutters on every single window. The brick house sat at the end of a very quiet street. The brick house contained four spacious bedrooms on the second floor. The brick house boasted a beautiful garden in the large backyard.

The tall tree provided deep shade during the hot summer months. The tall tree hosted several active bird nests in the canopy. The tall tree dropped thousands of brown leaves during the autumn. The tall tree grew near the edge of the public park.

The steel sword featured a beautiful gold handle with red rubies. The steel sword weighed exactly five pounds from hilt to tip. The steel sword belonged to the royal family of the kingdom. The steel sword hung in a display case in the museum.

The golden cup featured beautiful engravings of wild animals on the sides. The golden cup held almost a full pint of cold liquid. The golden cup sat on the middle shelf of the treasury. The golden cup felt very heavy in a bare human hand.

The leather jacket featured three deep pockets on the front side. The leather jacket kept the wearer warm in very cold weather. The leather jacket smelled like rich dark earth and pine trees. The leather jacket hung in the closet near the front door.

The heavy dictionary contained over one hundred thousand distinct English words. The heavy dictionary featured a dark blue cover with gold lettering. The heavy dictionary sat on a dedicated stand in the library. The heavy dictionary helped many students with difficult school essays.

The antique clock chimed a beautiful melody at the top hour. The antique clock featured a carved wooden case with glass doors. The antique clock stood over six feet tall in the hallway. The antique clock possessed a heavy brass pendulum inside the base.

The marble fountain featured carved statues of mythical water sea creatures. The marble fountain held hundreds of small coins in the basin. The marble fountain stood in the center of the royal courtyard. The marble fountain produced a relaxing sound of splashing clear water.

The steam locomotive pulled twenty heavy freight cars behind the engine. The steam locomotive featured a loud whistle on the metal roof. The steam locomotive consumed tons of black coal on every journey. The steam locomotive belonged to the national public railway transportation company.

The glass vase featured a beautiful etched pattern of delicate roses. The glass vase held a large bouquet of colorful spring flowers. The glass vase sat on the center of the dining table. The glass vase caught the morning sunlight through the dining window.

The iron gate featured sharp decorative spikes along the top edge. The iron gate blocked access to the private wealthy residential estate. The iron gate weighed several hundred pounds in solid dark metal. The iron gate swung open on heavy oiled metal side hinges.

The acoustic guitar featured a smooth spruce top with dark sides. The acoustic guitar produced a warm tone in the lower register. The acoustic guitar sat on a wooden stand in the corner. The acoustic guitar belonged to a very famous professional studio musician.

The stone castle featured four tall watchtowers at the corner walls. The stone castle overlooked a deep valley and a wide river. The stone castle contained a massive armory filled with ancient weapons. The stone castle protected the royal family during periods of war.

The woolen blanket featured a traditional plaid pattern in red colors. The woolen blanket smelled slightly of cedar wood and old smoke. The woolen blanket lay neatly folded at the foot of the bed. The woolen blanket provided excellent warmth during the freezing winter nights.

The copper pot featured a heavy iron handle on one side. The copper pot hung from a metal rack in the kitchen. The copper pot held exactly two gallons of hot boiling liquid. The copper pot belonged to a very famous French pastry chef.

The silk dress featured intricate lace details around the top neckline. The silk dress rustled softly with every single tiny bodily movement. The silk dress fit the beautiful bride perfectly on the day. The silk dress cost a small fortune at the designer boutique.

The silver trumpet featured three smooth valves on the top section. The silver trumpet produced a bright clear sound in the high register. The silver trumpet sat in a velvet case on the floor. The silver trumpet belonged to the first chair of the orchestra.

The oak desk featured five deep drawers on the right side. The oak desk took up half the space in the office. The oak desk felt completely smooth to a bare human touch. The oak desk held a computer and a stack of papers.

The velvet armchair featured soft red fabric over thick padded cushions. The velvet armchair sat next to a warm crackling stone fireplace. The velvet armchair provided a very comfortable spot for reading books. The velvet armchair rested on four carved wooden decorative short legs.

The canvas tent slept four grown adults comfortably during a trip. The canvas tent featured strong aluminum poles for a sturdy frame. The canvas tent resisted heavy rainstorms in the deep mountain woods. The canvas tent packed into a small portable dark green bag.

The brass telescope featured a powerful magnification lens in the barrel. The brass telescope pointed toward the bright stars in the sky. The brass telescope rested on a sturdy wooden tripod in the observatory. The brass telescope belonged to an amateur astronomer in the city.

The wooden wagon featured four large wheels with thick iron rims. The wooden wagon carried heavy loads of vegetables to the market. The wooden wagon bumped loudly over the uneven cobblestone city streets. The wooden wagon required two strong horses for adequate pulling power.

The rusty bicycle featured a comfortable wide seat with internal springs. The rusty bicycle lacked a working bell on the metal handlebars. The rusty bicycle leaned against the brick wall of the garage. The rusty bicycle transported a young boy to the local school.

The diamond ring featured a large central stone with incredible clarity. The diamond ring sparkled brightly in the dim evening restaurant light. The diamond ring cost three months of a standard worker salary. The diamond ring symbolized a promise of eternal love and devotion.

The porcelain doll featured painted blue eyes and realistic blonde hair. The porcelain doll wore a miniature Victorian dress with white lace. The porcelain doll sat on a high shelf in the bedroom. The porcelain doll looked slightly creepy in the dark night shadows.

The crystal chandelier featured fifty distinct electric candle lights around the base. The crystal chandelier hung from the high ceiling of the ballroom. The crystal chandelier scattered tiny rainbows across the smooth dance floor. The crystal chandelier required special cleaning fluid for the glass pieces.

The fishing net featured small metal weights along the bottom edge. The fishing net smelled of salt and decayed ocean plant matter. The fishing net spanned fifty feet in length across the water. The fishing net caught hundreds of silver fish in the bay.

The grand piano featured eighty-eight distinct keys in black and white. The grand piano occupied the entire corner of the living room. The grand piano produced a rich sound during classical music performances. The grand piano rested on three sturdy wooden legs with wheels.

The brick chimney featured a decorative metal cap on the top. The brick chimney released thick white smoke into the cold sky. The brick chimney ran up the entire side of the house. The brick chimney housed a small bird nest during the spring.

The wool sweater featured a complex cable knit pattern in blue. The wool sweater felt slightly itchy against bare human arm skin. The wool sweater smelled faintly of lavender soap and clean water. The wool sweater kept a sailor warm on the cold ocean.

The metal shield featured a painted coat of arms in red. The metal shield weighed twenty pounds of solid heavy forged steel. The metal shield hung over the fireplace in the great hall. The metal shield blocked many dangerous blows during the fierce war.

The silver coin featured the profile of an ancient Roman emperor. The silver coin felt cool and heavy in a person's palm. The silver coin sat in a velvet display case in a museum. The silver coin possessed a very high value among historical collectors.

The glass greenhouse featured hundreds of clear panes in metal frames. The glass greenhouse maintained a tropical temperature during the freezing winter. The glass greenhouse housed a rare collection of exotic orchid flowers. The glass greenhouse smelled of damp earth and sweet floral blooms.

The wooden barrel featured thick iron hoops around the curved sides. The wooden barrel held exactly fifty gallons of dark rich ale. The wooden barrel sat in the cool cellar of the tavern. The wooden barrel smelled strongly of yeast and fermented grain alcohol.

The tin roof featured a corrugated pattern for better water drainage. The tin roof made a loud drumming noise during heavy rainstorms. The tin roof reflected the harsh sunlight during the hot summer. The tin roof covered a small wooden shack in the woods.

The paper kite featured a long tail of colorful ribbon bows. The paper kite flew high above the trees in the park. The paper kite tugged hard against the string in the wind. The paper kite displayed a painted picture of a fierce dragon.

The clay pot featured a wide rim and a narrow base. The clay pot held a beautiful red geranium on the porch. The clay pot felt rough and porous to a human touch. The clay pot absorbed excess water from the rich dark soil.

The wooden flute featured six perfectly round finger holes in a row. The wooden flute produced a sweet tone in the high register. The wooden flute belonged to a traveling musician in the village. The wooden flute rested inside a velvet bag during long journeys.

The steel hammer featured a claw for pulling nails at the back. The steel hammer weighed exactly sixteen ounces in total balanced weight. The steel hammer hung from a leather loop on a tool belt. The steel hammer drove thick nails into solid oak wooden boards.

The brass compass featured a magnetic needle pointing toward the north. The brass compass fit perfectly in the palm of a hand. The brass compass helped explorers navigate through the dense dark jungle. The brass compass rested inside a padded wooden presentation display box.

The cotton shirt featured a pattern of blue and white checks. The cotton shirt felt very soft against bare warm human skin. The cotton shirt hung on a wooden hanger in the closet. The cotton shirt belonged to a busy farmer in the valley.

The stone pathway featured flat slate slabs arranged in a pattern. The stone pathway wound through a beautiful garden of blooming roses. The stone pathway provided a dry walking surface during the rain. The stone pathway connected the back door to the wooden gazebo.

The silver spoon featured an engraved family crest on the handle. The silver spoon lay neatly beside a porcelain bowl of soup. The silver spoon felt perfectly balanced in a diner's human hand. The silver spoon belonged to a very wealthy aristocrat in London.

The iron horseshoe featured a curved shape with several nail holes. The iron horseshoe protected the sensitive hoof of a working horse. The iron horseshoe hung over the barn door for good luck. The iron horseshoe weighed roughly one pound of solid heavy metal.

The wooden chest featured strong brass hinges on the heavy lid. The wooden chest held a large collection of folded winter blankets. The wooden chest sat at the foot of the master bed. The wooden chest smelled of strong cedar wood and old fabric.
